overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through a foggy cyberpunk city. The interior features glowing green holographic displays and a sleek dashboard. The vehicle navigates empty multi-lane roads surrounded by tall glass skyscrapers barely visible through heavy fog. This is gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic elevated city highway in heavy fog

agents.ego_description: driving a futuristic vehicle through dense fog on an elevated city highway, maintaining steady speed with hands visible on the steering wheel

entered.detail: sleek black dashboard with glowing green holographic displays and illuminated control panels
futuristic steering wheel with integrated green accent lighting and driver's hands gripping it
digital side mirror display showing the foggy exterior view
digital side mirror display on the passenger side
floating holographic speed indicator showing the number 11
green neon light strips lining the windshield frame
dense gray fog completely obscuring the distant futuristic architecture
tall modern glass towers barely visible as silhouettes through the heavy fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from the driver's seat of a futuristic vehicle navigating through heavy fog on an elevated city highway. The interior features a sleek dashboard with green holographic displays showing speed 11. Through the windshield, glass skyscrapers loom as ghostly silhouettes in the gray fog. The road is completely empty of other vehicles or pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic elevated city highway in heavy fog

events.description: digital speed display changes from 11 to 12 indicating slight acceleration

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive through the foggy city with minor steering adjustments to maintain lane position on the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving through the dense fog with the speedometer transitioning from 11 to 12. The driver makes subtle steering corrections as the car navigates the elevated highway. The glass skyscrapers shift from the left to center of the frame as the vehicle progresses through the futuristic cityscape. The environment remains consistently foggy with no other traffic visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic elevated city highway in heavy fog

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady cruise at the increased speed setting through the fog-shrouded downtown district

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued driving at the increased speed of 12 through the persistently foggy urban environment. The vehicle maintains a steady course on the empty multi-lane road as the glass skyscrapers gradually shift to the right side of the frame. The green-lit dashboard remains prominently visible, and the heavy fog continues to obscure the distant city architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a futuristic vehicle as it navigates a desolate, fog-shrouded highway through a cyberpunk city. It begins with the vehicle gliding through heavy gray mist, where the sleek dashboard's green holographic displays show a speed of 11 while ghostly glass skyscrapers loom as silhouettes through the windshield. As the vehicle progresses, the speedometer transitions to 12 and the driver makes subtle steering corrections, causing the towering buildings to shift from the left toward the center of the frame. The scene then maintains this steady pace on the empty multi-lane road, with the architecture gradually drifting to the right side of the view. Finally, the camera continues forward into the persistent fog, keeping the glowing green interior in focus as the distant city remains obscured.
